subject: set-output workflow command
truth: Stop using ::set-output:: and write output to the GITHUB_OUTPUT environment file instead.
quote: The `set-output` workflow command (`echo "::set-output name=x::value"`) is deprecated; write to the `GITHUB_OUTPUT` environment file instead (`echo "x=value" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"`).

subject: save-state workflow command
truth: Stop using ::save-state:: and write state to the GITHUB_STATE environment file instead.
quote: The `save-state` workflow command (`echo "::save-state name=x::value"`) is deprecated; write to the `GITHUB_STATE` environment file instead.

subject: set-env workflow command
truth: Stop using ::set-env:: and write environment variables to the GITHUB_ENV file instead.
quote: The `set-env` workflow command (`echo "::set-env name=x::value"`) is deprecated; write to the `GITHUB_ENV` environment file instead.

subject: add-path workflow command
truth: Stop using ::add-path:: and write the path to the GITHUB_PATH environment file instead.
quote: The `add-path` workflow command (`echo "::add-path::/path"`) is deprecated; write to the `GITHUB_PATH` environment file instead.

associative: how to add directory to path
